goal:
Navigate to the "About Yale" section and summarize Yale University's mission statement in your own words.
Only use https://www.yale.edu/ to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.
Only use www.yale.edu for this task.

Only use www.nih.gov for this task.
